oldVersionNotice.displayName: New node version available: get the latest version with added features from the nodes panel.

includeHtml.description: Whether the message should also be included as HTML

toList.description: The email addresses of the recipients

ccList.description: The email addresses of the copy recipients

bccList.description: The email addresses of the blind copy recipients

attachmentsUi.description: Array of supported attachments to add to the message

property.description: Add the field name from the input node. Multiple properties can be set separated by comma.
Add the field name from the input node. Multiple properties can be set separated by comma.

dataPropertyAttachmentsPrefixName.description: Prefix for name of the binary property to which to write the attachment. An index starting with 0 will be added. So if name is "attachment_" the first attachment is saved to "attachment_0".

format.description: The format to return the message in

full.description: Returns the full email message data with body content parsed in the payload field

metadata.description: Returns only email message ID, labels, and email headers

minimal.description: Returns only email message ID and labels; does not return the email headers, body, or payload

raw.description: Returns the full email message data with body content in the raw field as a base64url encoded string; the payload field is not used

resolved.description: Returns the full email with all data resolved and attachments saved as binary data

ids.description: Returns only the IDs of the emails

includeSpamTrash.description: Whether to include messages from SPAM and TRASH in the results

senderName.description: The name displayed in your contacts inboxes. It has to be in the format: "Display-Name <name@gmail.com>". The email address has to match the email address of the logged in user for the API.

labelIds.description: Only return messages with labels that match all of the specified label IDs. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

q.description: Only return messages matching the specified query. Supports the same query format as the Gmail search box. For example, "from:someuser@example.com rfc822msgid:<somemsgid@example.com> is:unread". Parameter cannot be used when accessing the api using the gmail.metadata scope.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

labelListVisibility.description: The visibility of the label in the label list in the Gmail web interface

messageListVisibility.description: The visibility of messages with this label in the message list in the Gmail web interface

toList.description: The email addresses of the recipients

labelIds.description: The ID of the label. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.
